title: BACKND Base startup for Unity
summary: Covers the first-run Unity integration path for BACKND Base: SDK download, Unity package import, console credential setup, a minimal initialization script, and play-mode verification.
capabilities: identify the initial Unity integration sequence
locate where Client App ID and Signature Key are expected
explain the normal success signal after setup
prerequisites: The project has valid BACKND console credentials
The BACKND Unity SDK has been downloaded from the official source
common_pitfalls: Using stale or missing Client App ID and Signature Key values
Forgetting that SDK upgrades may reset inspector-stored credentials
Assuming installation is complete before a play-mode initialization check succeeds
public_notes: This topic intentionally summarizes the flow and does not mirror the official page.
Agents should verify version-specific download links from the official documentation before presenting them as current.
